risks.reason: Legacy variables remain for compatibility after incremental token patches.
risks.currentTokenUsage: --green, --red, --amber, --blue, --black still exist; --amber is still used by .human-banner button.
risks.recommendedAction: Usage-map legacy tokens during Patch 5 before removal.

risks.reason: Base surface uses Research OS colors but still hardcodes the UI font stack instead of --nos-font-ui.
risks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 can remap font-family to --nos-font-ui after visual review.

risks.reason: Heading does not yet use the Research OS heading token.
risks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 should decide whether the sidepanel brand heading adopts the serif heading strategy.

risks.reason: White text on accent is close to contrast threshold based on static estimate.
risks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 should validate rendered contrast and consider stronger accent or dark text alternative.

risks.reason: Accent text on warm surface is below 4.5:1 in static estimate for normal text.
risks.currentTokenUsage: Uses --nos-color-accent for border, background mix and text.
risks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 should evaluate filled versus outline treatment without implying execution authority.

risks.reason: Focus ring exists but may be subtle on warm surfaces because alpha is 0.22.
risks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 should run manual keyboard review and tune ring strength if needed.

risks.reason: Dark technical island remains after base Research OS remaps and can pull the product back toward old control-center perception.
risks.currentTokenUsage: Partially remapped status badges, but core card background and many nested colors remain hardcoded.
risks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 or Claude audit should decide whether timeline remains dark or migrates to warm research archive styling.

risks.reason: Hardcoded blue can imply active runtime authority.
risks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 should classify running state semantics before remapping.

risks.reason: Warning color choice avoids active-blue semantics but static contrast estimate is weak.
risks.currentTokenUsage: Uses --nos-color-warning for text and background mix.
risks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 should darken warning text or add a stronger surface boundary.

risks.reason: Governance and handoff surfaces still use hardcoded legacy colors.
risks.currentTokenUsage: Partial legacy color use; not fully on Research OS tokens.
risks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 should map these surfaces to warning, danger, risk or governance tokens with explicit semantics.

risks.reason: Technical log surfaces remain visually raw in the runtime tab.
risks.currentTokenUsage: Container list items use --nos-color-border and --nos-color-bg; pre/log treatment remains utilitarian.
risks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 should decide whether logs stay secondary or become Mission Activity Feed styling.

recommendedNextStep: Patch 5 or Claude audit before additional CSS migration
